inputs.titre: Découverte des gènes du maïs transposables par Barbara McClintock

reason: The image depicts a woman in overalls, presumably Barbara McClintock, studying maize. Rolling hills and a rural building are visible in the background. The setting seems to be a scientific investigation, with corn being the main focus. The presence of a tractor, although tractors existed in the 1940s, the style might be more modern and the electric pendant lighting is more modern, docking the points. Overall the image seems to capture the general idea of the event with minor inaccuracies.
